subcodes.first_line: Holy remembrance, sanctified above all mention of the world and its peoples, befitteth the Ancient Lord, Who through His Most Great Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر مقدس از اذکار عالم و امم مالک قدم را لایق و سزاست که باسم اعظمش عالم را
subcodes.subjects: @purpose; goal of creation, @love of God, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
